programme.title: Franklin and Friends
programme.desc: "Franklin and Friends," based on the children's book series featuring Franklin, is a computer-animated series geared toward preschoolers that aims to teach the kids lessons. The series follows Franklin the turtle, now older than in the books and previous TV series, as he experiences adventures and achieves milestones in the community of Woodland, learning lessons along the way. Franklin's friends referenced in the title include best friend Bear, problem-solving Snail, practical joker Rabbit, natural leader Beaver, inventive Fox and empathetic Goose. The series tackles issues that include personal empowerment, socialization, self-esteem, appreciation of nature and school issues.

programme.title: Midwinter Night's Dream
programme.desc: When Emma accidentally causes Olivia to lose an important science prize, a furious Olivia breaks off her friendship with Emma and the other Friends. But after a New Year's Eve dream, in which a living, breathing Zobo takes her on a tour of her past, present and potential future, Olivia is reminded that friendship is the most valuable prize of all. Today is the most important day of Olivia's life. Not because tonight is New Year's Eve, but it's also the day of the annual Robotics Challenge, when teen scientists compete to build the best robot and win a full university scholarship. Olivia has spent the whole year preparing her entry: an all-new, high-tech, flying Aviator Zobo. It's a sure winner – until Emma accidentally sabotages it and wins the trophy herself! Furious, Olivia breaks off her friendship with Emma and the other Friends (for defending Emma), and stomps out in tears. That night, in a dream, a living, breathing Aviator Zobo takes her on a tour of her life – past, present and potential future – to remind her that friendship is the most valuable prize of all.

programme.title: The Day Ninjago Stood Still
programme.desc: The ninja try to flee from the rest of the Stone Army that has been brought to life by the Devourer's toxic venom - and things get a lot worse when Garmadon arrives with a ‘Helmet of Darkness' and seizes control of the Stone Army. Scales finally takes leadership over the Serpentine and plans to burrow beneath Ninjago City to level it to the ground. But as they burrow, they run into a lost chamber holding the rest of the Stone Army. The Devourer's toxic venom in the ground brings the Stone Army to life, sealing the Serpentine in their tomb, and returning the snakes back to where they were first found. On the Dark Island, the Overlord directs Lord Garmadon to a giant celestial clock. Garmadon removes a ‘Helmet of Darkness', which will grant the wearer control over the Stone Army, and also activate the clock to tick down to when the final battle will begin. Back in Ninjago City, the indestructible Stone Army surfaces and attacks, and the Ninja know the only thing they can do is to save as many people as they can. They manage to barely escape with other townspeople, only for the Destiny's Bounty's engines to get damaged. In the end, Lord Garmadon arrives with the helmet, and seizes control of the Stone Army.

programme.title: Kingdom Of Heroes
programme.desc: The Book of Monsters, having the final pieces of his evil plan in place, tries to take human form. Can the NEXO-Knights and Merlok 2.0 stop the greatest threat they've ever faced? Or will the kingdom be plunged into darkness…forever. The Redoubt of Ruination readies the final ceremony to call forth MONSTRUX, the arch-necromancer of the past. Clay, holding the Book of Betrayal walks to the gates of the spooky place. Inside, Clay hears strange…singing and music. It's like a twisted Broadway show of some kind. Meanwhile, the Knights all realize Clay is gone and so is the Book of Betrayal. Macy says Clay must be up to something. They have to trust him and, more importantly, they have to find him. At the Redoubt of Ruination the ceremony has already begun! The Book of Monsters wants the final ceremony that calls forth Monstrux to be like a really great show! The BOM then barfs up all the BOOKS OF EVIL into their places around Jestro. He's just missing the BOOK OF BETRAYAL, which Clay has. Clay says he'll trade the book for Jestro. The BOM immediately agrees to the deal and sets Jestro free. Then, Monsters grab-up Clay, restrain him, and put him in Jestro's place on the sacrifice stone. From outside, they're interrupted by the sounds of battle the Knights have arrived on the Fortrex and are attacking the Redoubt of Ruination. In the confusion, Jestro slips away. The BOM lets loose with a powerful protection spell to keep the Knights out as he starts with the ceremony…he's going to bring Monstrux out and remanifest him in Clay's body! Jestro is able to escape the Redoubt and make his way to the Knights, who can't seem to battle their way in. It's a race against time as the Knights try to get in and save Clay. As the Knights get in, they see that the crazy BOM is absorbing all the Books of Evil, one-by-one. He grows BIGGER and BIGGER! Macy calls for NEXO-Power…but it's not enough! The gigantic Book of Monsters sucks down the final book, the Book of Betrayal! He looms over Clay, about to consume him, too, and make him into Monstrux! Suddenly, Robin appears carrying TECHKALIBER…he tosses it to Clay. Just as the huge Book of Monsters falls on Clay, he holds up Techkaliber and Merlok 2.0 is there…his full power in the sword. Clay sticks the sword into the Book of Monster's huge mouth. BOOM! There's a BIG, MAGICAL EXPLOSION! As we cut back inside, we see the Book of Monsters is gone. The Knights release Clay and he thanks them and Jestro for saving him. Jestro thanks them all for saving him and seeing the good in him. WE DISSOLVE TO: The JoustDome. In a final ceremony the King and Queen reward the knights and congratulate them for keeping the kingdom safe. There are speeches, happiness and friendship. And Jestro even does a bit that's funny. At the very end we see a hint of something…Monstrux and the Book of Monsters are still out there.

programme.title: The Last Voyage
programme.desc: The Ninjas, Lloyd, Sensei Wu and Misako journey to the Dark Island to find a ‘Temple of Light' that can restore the Ninjas' elemental powers but are attacked by Starteeth (barnacle-like star fish) that start eating through their ship. The Stone Army and Lord Garmadon have disappeared, and our heroes can see the mysterious Dark Island off their coastline. Fearing Garmadon is up to no good, Sensei Wu has the whole team suit up to begin a journey to the Dark Island. Since the Bounty's engines are damaged, they plan to go by sea. Misako reveals her ancient scrolls state of a ‘Temple of Light' that could return the Ninja's elemental powers, and it could be found on the island. Meanwhile, Lord Garmadon has the Army mining for more ‘Dark Matter', using it to build a Super-Weapon that will recreate Ninjago in a twisted evil way. When a storm hits at sea, our heroes are attacked by Starteeth (barnacle-like starfish that can eat through a ship) and are forced to find refuge on a lighthouse at sea. Inside, Zane discovers his inventor father, the Tinkerer, is alive! Together, they repair the Bounty so it can fly again, escaping a giant Leviathan, and soaring to the Dark Island ahead.

programme.title: The Cloud
programme.desc: A storm is brewing over Knighton. Monstrox has taken the form of a cloud, and is raising an army of lightning infused Stone Monsters. His first target is the new Lavalands Amusement Park. Harmony reigns in Knighton as the Knights pursue their civilian lives: Lance has a TV talk show Axl is the singing chef on the show Jestro is the weatherman Clay is teaching at the Knights' Academy Macy, Ava and Merlok 2.0 travel the land in the Fortrex making sure the kingdom's defenses are ready (part of a plan she and Clay have) Aaron and his hover shield is travelling the land setting extreme records. Robin is at his workshop at the Knights' Academy doing an “independent study” – he's working on some top secret project for Merlok 2.0. It all seems excellent! We even see the Knights new vehicles – which have been optimized for civilian life (except for Clay's.) But storm clouds are brewing. Well, one storm cloud is brewing: the Cloud of Monstrox! Yes, the Book of Monsters has reconstituted himself and is now a cloud who needs a man on the ground to enact his new evil plan. He follows his old buddy Jestro as he goes across the realm on the weekends apologizing for being evil. ZAP! With one bolt of his evil magic lighting, the Cloud of Monstrox turns Jestro evil again (only this time a bit, well, too evil.) The evil duo are back together – and bring stone to life for the first time in the form of Gargoyles from the town of GHOULIA. Now they must gather the Forbidden Powers so that the Cloud of Monstrox can destroy the entire kingdom! A battle breaks out in the Lava Lands, where Lance and Alice Squires are reporting from the opening of the Cuthbert Richmond funded Lava Lands Amusement Park, rebuilt from the remains of Jestro's old HQ. Jestro and the Cloud are after something in the remains and as Merlok 2.0 sends out a call for the Knights to help Lance. Can Lance (with an assist from King Halbert in his Mech) hold-off Jestro, the Cloud and their new army of stone fighters?!

programme.title: The Island Of Darkness
programme.desc: After battling off Garmadon's Stone Army, the Ninjas finally arrive at the Temple of Light where they harness their pure elemental powers, concentrating them onto Lloyd who becomes more powerful than he ever imagined. The Ninja camouflage the Bounty, creating a secret rebel base on the island. Misako says they must find the Temple of Light, because only when their elemental powers return, will they be strong enough to defeat the indestructible Stone Army. The Ninja search the dark, exotic island and come across Garmadon's compound, where they're building the Super-Weapon. The Ninja discover the Temple of Light is hidden at the highest peak of the island, and the Tinkerer aids their trek in creating a Drill Dozer so they can travel underground unnoticed. A final chase and battle takes place at the Temple of Light, as the Ninja solve the puzzle and harness their pure elemental powers, concentrating them onto Lloyd, who also becomes more powerful then he ever imagined. Their new abilities can destroy the indestructible Stone Warriors. Although Lord Garmadon finds this to be a setback, the Overlord reassures him darkness will prevail, as we end on seeing the Celestial Clock ticking down closer to zero.

programme.title: A Little Rusty
programme.desc: The Cloud of Monstrox and Jestro unlocks a mysterious Forbidden Power. What kind ofhavoc will they unleash? And can Merlok 2.0 and the NEXO KNIGHTS make the new COMBO NEXO Powers work? The Knights finally make it to the Lava Lands – using their various new forms of transport, which are all strictly civilian vechicles – and they must regroup and learn to fight together again to face the new threat of Jestro, the Cloud of Monstrox, and their STONE MONSTERS (in this case, Stone Gargoyles.) But Jestro and his monsters beat back the knights and recover the STAFF OF MONSTROX – which was buried under the ceremonial chamber from Episode 210 (and is now the Lava Puker amusement park ride) – and they get away on Jestro's EVIL MOBILE, which he recovers from the HQ garage. Macy says this is exactly why she's been touring the kingdom preparing everyone for the next attack. The Knights have to get it together because now the entire kingdom is under threat…again. Robin decides he must upgrade the Knights' vehicles and make them more “fight optimized.” Ava and Merlok 2.0 must figure out how to use new NEXO Powers because regular NEXO Powers do make Stone monsters back into stone, but the Cloud simply zaps them to life again. Meanwhile, in the IRON MOUNTAINS, Jestro and the Cloud of Monstrox find the first of the Forbidden Powers: RELENTLESS RUST. They find the ROGUL STATUE holding the power and zap him to life. Now…they can rust those shiny knights to pieces! Ava and Merlok are attempting to use NEXO COMBO POWERS – with hilarious results – as they try to figure out how they might work. When Jestro attacks, he's able to halt the Fortrex by instantly rusting its tracks and wheels! Robin has his hands full trying to clean all the rust from the attack of Relentless Rust. As the Knights attempt to defend against Jestro, the Cloud is zapping statues to life. He hits a statue with a bolt of lightning as Clay is touching it. Something happens…Clay feels odd stiff as if rock is mixing with his body. Finally, Ava and Merlok 2.0 download to the Knights their new thing: a COMBO NEXO COMBO Power. It works! It can smash the animated statues to dust! They use it to defeat Jestro, but he and the Cloud get away with the Forbidden Power of Relentless Rust. Victory … sort of. Clay talks to Merlok 2.0…something has happened to him. What can they do? Merlok 2.0 is very concerned.

programme.title: The Last Hope
programme.desc: When the Ninjas' attempt to return Garmadon's ‘Helmet of Darkness' to its perch at the Celestial Clock in order to prevent the final battle between Lloyd and his father from beginning fails, a Super Weapon is created that can destroy all of Ninjago. With the Overlord and Garmadon nearing completion of the Super-Weapon, Misako tells the group she thinks there could be one last chance at preventing Lloyd's final battle with his father. She believes if they can steal the helmet off Garmadon's head and return it to it's rightful perch on the Celestial Clock, it could stop the clock before it reaches zero, thus preventing the final battle from beginning. Dressed as Warriors, the Ninja escort their ‘captive' Misako to Garmadon, and the heroes see glimpses of the Super-Weapon being built. In a thrilling escape, Misako cleverly steals Garmadon's helmet, and they race to the Celestial Clock. Lloyd has a brief encounter with his father, and hesitates striking him. When they return the helmet to its rightful perch, they're one second too late, allowing the clock to reach zero, and for it to focus a beam of concentrated light from the sky into the Super-Weapon. Nya is taken hostage, as the others fall off a cliff, barely surviving the fall. The Ninja have failed -- the final battle has begun.

programme.title: Thunderstox
programme.desc: Jestro and the Cloud of Monstrox encounters the sculptor. He helps unleash a horde of fierce garden gnomes on Knighton. What will the NEXO KNIGHTS do against this new enemy? Will their new COMBO NEXO Powers do the trick? As Jestro and the Cloud of Monstrox head off on the Evil Mobile to 'store' the Forbidden Power in a secret location, they encounter…THE SCULPTOR. His real name is ROBERTO ARNOLDI. He's a sensitive and odd artist who has been laid off by the king (the King ordered a "smashing" statue of the Queen, and the Sculptor made a statue of the Queen literally smashing monsters. He takes everything very literally.) Jestro instructs him to make a "bad" statue that he can use to attack the knights. The Sculptor sets to work. Meanwhile, the NEXO KNIGHTS are discussing the COMBO NEXO Powers, the Forbidden Powers, and what all this means. Lance, meanwhile, decides that since his talk show career is on hold, he thinks he'll install cameras in the Fortrex and do a Big Brother-like expose show on the Knights (he decides NOT to tell the others.) Merlok 2.0 and the Cloud of Monstrox (each talking to their cohorts) explain the history of the Forbidden Powers: it's a history lesson about the WIZARDS' COUNCIL, the Forbidden Powers, and how they were stopped long ago. This visual montage leads Jestro to…MOUNT THUNDERSTROX. The Cloud of Monstrox shows him the circle of ten Standing Stones where he will insert the Forbidden Powers. "What'll happen after that?” asks Jestro, curious. "Oh, I don't want to spoil the surprise," says the Cloud. They insert the first Forbidden Power, Relentless Rust, and it locks into place on its stone. They go off to battle the Knights and collect the "bad" statue the sculptor is making. But he's made a literally bad statue…it's terrible ... garden gnomes. Like an amateur art student. And…it's not even finished. ("You can't rush bad genius!") The Knights attack with their newly modified vehicles and they succeed in destroying the Evil Mobile. They then try to use a COMBO NEXO Power, but can't…it had to be perfect to work (Ava and Merlok need to work on it.) As Jestro and the Cloud retreat, Merlok again talks to Clay about turning to stone! Merlok calls in Robin…he will need him to build something to help Clay as he becomes more and more impaired.

programme.title: Return Of The Overlord
programme.desc: When Garmadon uses his new Super-Weapon to turn Jamakai Village evil, he unwittingly unsettles the balance, allowing the spirit of the Overlord to cross over and possesses his body. Lord Garmadon witnesses the Super-Weapon come to life, revealing it to be ‘Garma-Tron', a giant moving cannon. His first test subject is Nya. Meanwhile, the heroes prepare for the final battle and sneak-attack Garmadon's compound…only to find it empty. The Super-Weapon is moving towards the coastline, where the cannon's range can reach Ninjago. On the way there, the Ninja must face off with Evil Nya, turned dark from the Super-Weapon. On the coastline, Lloyd battles his father atop Garma-Tron. The battle is fierce, but Lloyd fails at stopping his father from firing Garma-Tron, turning Jamanakai Village evil. Garmadon naively celebrates, not realizing he's undone the balance, allowing the spirit of the Overlord to cross over and possess his body. And as the Overlord continues to get more powerful, a hideous metamorphosis is taking place. Lloyd must fight the Overlord, and just when it looks like good will prevail, Lloyd is injured and thrown to the ground. In the end, the villains escape through a portal to Ninjago, and our heroes are abandoned on the island with no way home. And with the Green Ninja injured, it looks like all is lost. Evil has won.

programme.title: Rotten Luck
programme.desc: Jestro and the Cloud of Monstrox unleashes the Forbidden Power Ravaging Rot on Knighton! Turning everything into green gooey rot. But Robin has an awesome new invention that could help the NEXO KNIGHTS Jestro and the Cloud of Monstrox find a second Forbidden Power near the falling down Swamp Castle: RAVAGING ROT. With this power, they can make everything in the kingdom rot – food, vegetation, anything that grows or is natural. And that's exactly what they do! It's awful and makes everything stink. The Sculptor start to sculpt a portable HeadQuarter for his master, Jestro. Jestro expects it to be done when they return from ravaging the land. Axl is very concerned – he's into organic food ... and now food starts to rot. Merlok 2.0 and Ava are continuing to work on perfecting the COMBO NEXO Powers. We see display screens of MANY of the NEXO Powers. But there's a huge power consumption issue with these new-fangled combos. “I'll have to find an algorithmic power curve consumption solution, magic man,” says Ava. “I always just sort of choose them by, uh, feel.” “What do you feel like?” “Uh, a ham sandwich, a banana, and dragon fire,” responds Merlok. “That produced a combo with 2% efficiency,” says Ava. “This is why we have to actually THINK about and study perfec Combos. We need automatic power integration.” The Knights must stop Jestro from rotting all the food and living plant matter in Knighton and Axl leads the charge. But as they finally confront Jestro, who's trying to rot a field of beans near Fruitbridge, they're hit by his finally completed ROLLING HQ (the Sculptor is proud of the “artsy” elements.) … it's not exactly perfect though … he took the idea of Head Quarter a little too litteral and created a big head. Finally, in this conclusive battle where the knights get strapped on a rotting bridge, Clay emerges in a sleek, new BATTLE SUIT that Robin built for him because he was starting to have trouble moving around (the whole turning to stone thing.) It's smaller and more high-tech than the bigger Mechs of the past. Clay's able to drive Jestro off. Jestro, at the end of the episode, puts the Forbidden Power of Ravaging Rot into Mount Thunderstrox. Meanwhile, back at the Fortrex, Axl makes an organic food feast for all his fellow Knights.

programme.title: Rise Of The Snakes
programme.desc: The four Ninja are snapped out of their post-hero complacency when Lord Garmadon's young son Lloyd shows up and tries to pick up where his father left off. The Ninja dismiss him as a threat, but regret that choice after Lloyd wakes up the evil snake tribe. A prophecy is revealed that states a green ninja will ultimately defeat Lord Garmadon.

programme.title: The Book Of Monsters, Part 1
programme.desc: When Jestro the Jester finds the Book of Monsters, chaos breaks loose in the Kingdom of Knighton. Can the newly graduated Knights from the Knights' Academy save the kingdom? It's final graduation fighting exams for the latest Knights from Knights' Academy. All our new Knights demonstrate their prowess: CLAY, AARON, AXL and LANCE. PRINCESS MACY get to join them, but her father doesn't want her to graduate. As part of the entertainment, MERLOK does an amazing magic trick. His act is followed by…JESTRO, the King's Jester. He's terrible (and he should know to never follow a better act.) Everyone laughed because he's a real joke....a total failure. While Jestro roams the halls fo the King's Castle, forlorn, he hears the BOOK OF MONSTERS calling to him from Merlok's library. The book talks Jestro into gathering as many books of spells as he can carry, but they're interrupted by...Clay! As Jestro quickly pages through the Book of Monsters to attack Clay, Merlok arrives. There's a battle in the library between Jestro and Merlok. Finally, the wizard summons up his most powerful spell in self-defence. BOOM! There's a big, magical explosion and when Clay forces his way back into the library, Merlok, Jestro and the magic books are...GONE!

programme.title: New Girl in Town
programme.desc: When the World Petacular comes to Heartlake City and is almost ruined before it's even started, five feisty girls unite, despite their differences, using their creativity to save the day. Best friends Olivia, Andrea, Emma, Mia and Stephanie reside in HeartLake City but didn't know each other - that is until the World Petacular brought them together! On the eve of the biggest event Heartlake City hosts, disaster and chaos is abound. New-in-town Olivia is helping her veterinarian Aunt Sophie with her mobile clinic. But when she's put in charge of training a scruffy puppy named Scarlet, the puppy runs amuck, leaving a trail of destruction as she collides with Andrea, ruins Emma's banner and Stephanie's cakes, and finally spooks Mia's horse Bella who bucks Mia off and sprints away. The girls quickly unite, helping each-other to save the day and most importantly have fun along the way!

programme.title: Home
programme.desc: Back in training mode with the looming threat of Lloyd and the Hypnobrai, Zane wanders after a Falcon and lands himself in a heap of trouble. The rest of the Ninja leave the training dojo to help him and return to find that the snakes have burned it to the ground.

programme.title: The Book Of Monsters, Part 2
programme.desc: Realizing they must defend the Kingdom from Jestro's monsters, the Knights try to organize but are despondent when they discover their best advisor – Merlok the Magician – has sacrificed himself to save them. When Jestro awakens, he's been blasted miles and miles away from the King's Castle by Merlok's explosive spell. And, it seems, all the books he was trying to steal have been scattered, too. The Book of Monsters broke Jestro' fall and now he can use the book to attack the people who laughed at him. Meanwhile, the King and his newly-trained Knights pick through the rubble of Merlok's library. They'll have to figure something out, because Jestro and his newly made magic monsters attack King's Castle! Clay organizes the Knights to defend the kingdom, but they've never worked together before. It takes all their training, plus the help of an old friend…MERLOK! Only now he's MERLOK 2.0. Ava has been piecing together what happened and discovering that the “ghost in the machine” she's been chasing is really Merlok in digital form. Now, he can use his magic digitally and he downloads just the right weapons to the struggling Knights! They finally foil Jestro's attack with Merlok's help and officially become NEXO KNIGHTS!

programme.title: Stephanie's Surprise Party
programme.desc: When Emma, Olivia, Andrea and Mia plan a surprise party for Stephanie's birthday, they soon discover that it's not easy keeping their plans secret from Stephanie who becomes suspicious when none of the girls have time to hang out. When Emma, Olivia, Andrea and Mia plan a surprise party for Stephanie's birthday, they discover that it's not easy keeping their plans a secret. As the girls choreograph a dance routine, magic show and search for the perfect present and cake, Stephanie becomes aware that her friends are avoiding her on her birthday and excluding her from their activities... Little does she know that her friends are secretly preparing a surprise pool party for her! Once the surprise is revealed Stephanie realises how much her friends care about her and the importance of friendship.

programme.title: Snakebit
programme.desc: Lloyd, having been kicked out of the Hynobrai snake tribe unlocks a second tribe – The Fangpyres – to help him regain control. The Ninja are busy setting up their new HQ that Zane discovered, but are called to duty when the Fangpyres attack the village where Jay's family lives.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Sonic leaves Tails in charge of protecting a squirrel village food supply, when he zips off to stop a dam from breaking. Robotnik sends Scratch and Grounder after Tails.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Robotnik lures Sonic into a round-the-planet vehicle race called the Mobius 5000 by threatening to foreclose on a loan to an orphanage.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Sonic and Tails help out an Owl/Chilidog Diner owner, named Bert Whoo, when Robotnik uses his henchbots to try to collect protection money. When the henchbots prove to be no match for Sonic.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: When an undersea world is threatened by Captain Memo and his lobster sub, Sonic spreads a rumor that Memo plans to attack Robotnik next.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Robotnik learns that the most powerful gemstone -- able to create life itself -- is located in Prehistoric Times.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Sonic loses his memory when Robotnik uses a hypnotic flower pollen on him, and tells him he's just an "ordinary" guy.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Robotnik captures a Kangaroo named MacHopper, and uses his "brain-wipe-reprogramming-computer" to transform him into a resourceful demolitions expert (Ala MacGiver).

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Momma escapes again from the Mobius Home for Really Bizarre People, disowns Robotnik for failing to capture Sonic, then with the help of an obscure Mobius law, adopts Sonic!

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Robotnik lures Sonic into a round-the-planet vehicle race called the Mobius 5000 by threatening to foreclose on a loan to an orphanage.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Robotnik captures a Kangaroo named MacHopper, and uses his "brain-wipe-reprogramming-computer" to transform him into a resourceful demolitions expert (Ala MacGiver).

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Tails gets a megadose of Robotniks growth gas and grows quickly to monstrous proportions, eating everything in sight and accidentally terrorizing the countryside.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Robotnik takes over a local amusement park called "Mobiusland" and changes the name to "Robotnikland".

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Sonic and Tails find an underground world of diamonds, but they are held captive there by a miserly Mole-Troll. When Robotnik comes to capture them, he accidently frees them from the Mole-Troll, who teams up with Sonic and Tails to defend his riches.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: A winter-time holiday has arisen in the Eastern Caverns around the mysterious "Giver," who makes an annual visit to deliver slugs to the people of the East. But when a group of thieves make off with the Giver's precious cargo of slugs, our heroes must ride to the rescue-and discover the secret of who the Giver really is.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.sub-title: The Fall of the Eastern Champion
programme.desc: Junjie recounts the ancient history of the Eastern Caverns and his ancestors, and the events that led to his downfall and transformation from the Eastern Champion to the Dark Slinger.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: When Pronto accidentally uses the Emperor's sword blaster, he can suddenly do no wrong. Lady Dai-Fu manipulates Underlord Holt into trapping the Shane Gang with a new superweapon: the Iron Warrior!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.sub-title: The Return of the Eastern Champion
programme.desc: Junjie, Eli and the Gang rally their friends and even some old enemies-to help them take down the Emperor.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: The Shane Gang return home to the 99 caverns to find Gateway Cavern overrun with slugs-in Eli's absence, the Shadow Clan have governed by putting the slugs before the people, and the result is chaos! It's up to Eli to restore the balance, but the Shadow Clan aren't as friendly as they once were...and that's saying something. Help comes from an unexpected source-Tad and his slug Pieper, who just arrived from the Surface!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: The Shane Gang take Tad under their wing, training him to blast like a pro with Eli's old blaster and teaching him to live by the slugslinger's code. Tad takes to it like a natural, and as Kord says, it looks like they have another "slugslinging savant from the Surface" on their hands. But their training will be put to the test when Tad accompanies them to a showdown with the Scrap Force...and the Shadow Clan!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Tad's hypnotic slug Pieper has gone megamorph, his gang of supporters all have Gattler blasters, and Tad's control over his army of ghouls is stronger than Dr. Blakk's ever was. The Shane Gang are under non-stop ghoul fire as they struggle to put a stop to Tad's plans and end the mass ghouling of slugs once and for all.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.sub-title: The World Beneath Our Feet Pt 1
programme.desc: 15-year-old Eli Shane is a regular kid except for one thing: he comes from a long line of Shanes, each who has journied from the surface to protect Slugterra and the slugs that make the world special.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.sub-title: The World Beneath Our Feet Pt 2
programme.desc: Now its Eli's turn to be Slugterra's next Shane - whether he's ready or not! Unfortunately, the slugslinging tournament he enters to prove that he's ready, pretty quickly shows that he's not! So when word of this new Shane reaches the ears of the nefarious Dr. Blakk, he's not too worried... yet.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.sub-title: The World Beneath Our Feet Pt 1
programme.desc: 15-year-old Eli Shane is a regular kid except for one thing: he comes from a long line of Shanes, each who has journied from the surface to protect Slugterra and the slugs that make the world special.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: After the Shane hideout is ransacked, the gang trades in one of Eli's prized slugs for new gear. When Eli has second thoughts they go back to get it, only to learn that it's been sold to Dr. Blakk, along with hundreds of others to be transformed into feral Ghoul Slugs. Eli refuses to let his slug or any other get ghouled, so the team breaks in to Blakk's fortress to free them. While inside, they learn of Blakk's plan to conquer Slugterra.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: When the punks in the Hooligang cruise into Quiet Lawn Cavern, they think no one there's got the guts to stand up to them so they trash the place.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: The gang signs up for a weekend camp that promises to teach your slugs tons of new moves - without lifting a finger! Eli thinks it sounds too good to be true... and it is. But exposing the truth draws the ire of the camp's director - and half the campers!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: When even Kord can't find a way to fix what's wrong with the new upgrades to the Shane Gang's Mecha Beasts, it's time to go to the source: the wondrous Mecha Forge! Hoping to find the cause of the glitch, the gang instead uncovers a huge conspiracy - hatched by Dr. Blakk!

programme.title: Kids Diana Show
programme.desc: Tune in for a holiday pretend play adventure with Diana, the Princess of Play, and her brother, Roma!

programme.title: Ryan's World
programme.desc: Fun runs in the family! Ryan and Mommy play classic kids' games, challenges, and make a little playtime magic.

programme.title: Ryan's World
programme.desc: School's in session in Ryan's World, and Ryan can't wait! Tag along for wacky classroom challenges and games.

programme.title: Jason Vlogs
programme.desc: Jason and Alex hit the road! The brothers visit a kids museum, the zoo, get their eyesight checked and more.

programme.title: Ryan's World
programme.desc: Ryan shows off his box fort know-how with his DIY box fort vending machine, an arcade box fort maze and more!

programme.title: Jason Vlogs
programme.desc: Pull on your knee pads! Jason and Alex learn the importance of safety, plus even more fun lessons for kids.

programme.title: Ryan's World
programme.desc: Ryan and his family step out into the world for the ultimate day of play, from arcades to indoor playgrounds!

programme.title: Mackenzie Turner Roblox | Vol 7
programme.desc: Roblox fanatic Mackenzie Turner is known for her comedic and exuberant Brookhaven and Adopt Me videos!

programme.title: Denis | Virtual Bikes and Hikes!
programme.desc: Meet Denis, the gaming superstar who takes on obbys – and builds his own – within Roblox and Minecraft!

programme.title: KidCity | Challenge Mania!
programme.desc: Play along with the KidCity family —Little Flash, Ava, DadCity, and MomCity— in all their kid-friendly games!

programme.title: Onyx Family Ultimate mishmash Vol 4
programme.desc: Onyx Family is best known for their spooky skits, starring the Onyx Kids: Shiloh, Shasha, Sinead, and Shalom.

programme.title: Challenge Squad | IRL Games!
programme.desc: Challenge Squad takes on the most epic challenges, featuring your favorite YouTube stars!

programme.title: EvanTubeHD | Revenge of the Slime!
programme.desc: Share in the fun with YouTube star EvanTubeHD, his sister JillianTubeHD, and the whole Tube Family!

programme.title: HobbyKidsTV | Silly Surprise Eggs!
programme.desc: Come along for the fun with popular YouTube family, HobbyKidsTV! Plus, HobbyKids Adventures!

programme.title: Monsuno
programme.desc: The series revolves around re-awakened Monster DNA, called Monsuno, that finds its way into the unsuspecting hands of adventure-seeking teenagers Chase, Jinja, and Bren. Accompanied by their Monsuno, Lock, Charger, and Quickforce, they are searching for Chase's father Jeredy Suno, the creator of the Monsuno

programme.title: Sprinter Galore
programme.desc: The good-hearted Sprinter Galore is back at his home planet, battling evil villains bent.

programme.title: Eliot Kid
programme.desc: When a tooth falling out turns into a hunt for the “giant mouse”, when the city's sewers transform into Indiana Jones' white rapids or when a trip to the toilets becomes an expedition to a haunted house, well then you've entered the wonderful world of Eliot Kid!

programme.title: Bat Pat
programme.desc: The series follows the comedy adventures of Bat Pat and the Silver brothers Martin, Leo and Rebecca as they unravel mysteries and cross paths with supernatural creatures of the night that lurk, haunt, shriek and dig themselves up in every dark corner of their home in Fogville, a small town that seems to be the center of all things weird in the world, a veritable magnet to ghosts, mummies, witches, creatures, werewolves and things that go bump in the night. Bat Pat will prove that the supernatural isn't always evil but just misunderstood. Our heroes will come to understand something important: the supernatural “bad guys” are not really bad, but normal people whose actions are misunderstood by the more inhabitants of Fogville and what they really want is... just help!

programme.title: Talking Tom and Friends
programme.desc: Things get even more epic in Season 3 as Talking Tom and Friends try new ways to make their dreams come true, making more friends (and enemies) along the way!

programme.title: Fishtronaut
programme.desc: The series tells the story of Fishtronaut, a fish in a spacesuit, similar to reverse scuba gear, which allows him to fly and breathe out of water.

programme.title: BFF
programme.desc: The BFF's are a group of teenage friends that together will go through the most difficult situations and become best friends forever! Their adventures are full of hilarious moments, interrupted by a magical character who tries to spread bad vibrations.

programme.title: Ollie! The Boy Who Became What He Ate
programme.desc: Ollie is a 6-year-old with a massive imagination, often lost in his own world - flipping, sliding, climbing and rocket-blasting through the house, practicing at being the master of all things. But even masters need to stop and refuel. When meals or snack time interrupt Ollie's play, he finds himself confronted with the real challenge of childhood trying new food. To escape his predicament, Ollie uses his magic spoon to transport himself, along with his sister Poppy, and her stuffy Nummy, to a food planet filled with adventure and the very food Ollie stuck his spoon into.

programme.title: Pirate school
programme.desc: On a small remote island surrounded by endless seas, a special Pirate School was opened, where children from pirate families study. Among them are Keel, Fuse and Bobo. The pirate origin does not relieve them from study and normal school duties.

programme.title: The Fixies
programme.desc: The Fixies follows the comical misadventures of Tom Thomas and his secret friendship with Simka and Nolik, the children of the Fixie family that lives in his apartment. There's just no end to the troubles Tom Thomas and his Fixie friends get themselves into with all the gadgets and appliances around them!

programme.title: The Pirates Next Door
programme.desc: A small town's quiet life is suddenly turned upside down by the arrival of a family of pirates! For Matilda, her new neighbors are a dream come true! With Jim Lad, the Jolley-Rogers' son, around, there's no chance of getting bored.

programme.title: Shaun the Sheep
programme.desc: It's countryside chaos as Shaun The Sheep returns to the small screen with his very own series. Peace in the valley turns to mayhem in the meadow as Shaun leads his flock into all sorts of scrapes and scraps, running rings around sheepdog Bitzer when the Farmer's back is turned.

programme.title: The Deep End in Minecraft with Krew: Taking it too far with pranks with Stacyplays!
programme.desc: We visit Joey's house for a home makeover!

programme.title: Magic Mixies: Mixlings: Volcano / Time to Relax
programme.desc: Sienna and the Mixlings decide to go to one of the most dangerous places in Mixia Volatile Volcano! Each Mixling gets to ask Divina one question about their future which hints that Sienna's magic is far more powerful than they originally thought...what will this mean for the future of the Mixlings?! / Sienna and the Mixlings head to Rainforest Retreat for some much-needed self-care...or so they thought. Can Sienna use her magic to escape the army of Mixlings entranced by chaotic magic?!

programme.title: Lucas The Spider: Boo / Never Boop a Robot
programme.desc: Lucas loves to give his friends a scare on Halloween. / When Lucas boops a robot, he and his friends are chased around House!

programme.title: Mirette Investigates: The River Thames Monster / Royal Rendezvous
programme.desc: A giant creature looms up out of the Thames in London! / Mirette and Jean-Patt meet the Queen of England for the first time. But the Queen and Jean-Pat are brainwashed and suddenly want to give away e

programme.title: Dinocore: Showdown! Rex vs. Darkno
programme.desc: Darkno tries to make the volcano erupt. Dino Island is in danger, and Rex heads toward the volcano to protect the island but encounters a swarm of Mecha Dinos in his way.

programme.title: The Dodo
programme.desc: Rescuers help a shy, stray dog who's not feeling well - now they need to find her a home! / Turbo the dog was born without front legs. He had so much trouble walking, and really needed help! His rescuer found a way to get Turbo moving again: a special wheelchair, just for dogs! / Acorn the squirrel was just a baby when Chris found him. Now, Chris is kind of his dad! But there's one small problem: Acorn needs to become a wild squirrel again. Can he learn to live out in the wild by himself?

programme.title: SpitBrix: 20 MOST INCREDIBLE LEGO WORLD RECORDS

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Reno's journey began at the Punchline Comedy Club in Atlanta, GA where he tended bar to supplement his day job. He found himself on stage during the weekly open mic night. His unique outlook on life - mixed with a six-pack, was instantly popular.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Matt Bergman talks about being bad at handhsakes, accidentally breaking into an elderly woman's house, and bombing as an opener for the Goo Goo Dolls with sharp and self-deprecating humor.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.sub-title: Steve Hofstetter: A Trip to Japan
programme.desc: Often called the "hardest working man in show-business", Steve Hofstetter covers everything from paper decapitations in plane crashes to seeing-eye children.

programme.title: Chad Thornsberry
programme.desc: Chad Thornsberry was born in St. Louis, MO. From an early age he learned his family was blessed, and blessed him with humor, quick wit, and a love of storytelling. Chad's unique comedic perspective awards audience the opportunity to laugh at the common occurrences in everyday life. Often referred to as a great writer, his straightforward style allows audiences to laugh with him and at him as they find the humor in themselves. With reflections on growing up in a trailer park and observations as an English teacher, Chad's satiric insights look at the pitfalls that make us human. With smart humor and a conversational style, Chad has delighted audiences from the trailer park, throughout the Midwest, and from coast to coast.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.sub-title: Chris Schlichting: Catch and Dress a Squirrel
programme.desc: Chris Schlichting, an Iowan with every bone in his body still intact, comes with a few crucial warnings. Beware of birthday wishes, day raccoons, and the spelling on all hand written love letters.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Born in Lebanon and raised in the American South, Maher Matta jokes about flying while Arab, using Rogaine at fifteen, and working as a state trooper.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.sub-title: Chris Strait: Laugh Till You Run Out of Air
programme.desc: If your type of comedian is someone who reminds us all how funny we all are, Chris Strait is for you! No funny topic is off-limits for this California native but he's just telling his story.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: LA comic, Nick Arnette, riffs on starting to date grandmas, his border exchange policy, and why Baby Boomers are the coolest generation.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Jeremy Nunes has drawn rave reviews from critics for his clever observations, unique storytelling style, and ability to improvise with his audience.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Orlando Baxter's fresh perspective and unique relatability makes this former high school teacher a fan favorite all over the world. In 2016, Orlando made his late night TV debut on the Conan show on TBS, and since then he's appeared on the television shows "Comedy Up Late" in Australia, B.E.T.'s "50 Central" and Laff Mobb's Laff Track on Tru TV.

programme.title: Louie Anderson Big Baby Boomer

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: Uninvited is a horror movie written and directed by Star Games and Final Justice mastermind Greydon Clark, so it's not surprising that Greydon Clark put himself in the movie. What is surprising? Pretty much everything else. This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with a comedic commentary by Mike, Kevin and Bill from RiffTrax (formerly of Mystery Science Theater 3000).

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: The scourge of the demon weed Marijuana is causing teens to go insane and even murder! Join the stars of MST3K as you inhale this 1930's cautionary tale filmed Live!

programme.title: RiffTrax

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: RiffTrax, the guys who make movies funny, bring their comedic riffing treatment to this cheesy exploitation classic about a loony who impersonates a mad scientist and likes popping out cat's eyeballs. Join Mike, Kevin and Bill for Maniac!

programme.title: Mechanic Resurrection
programme.desc: Arthur Bishop [Jason Statham] returns as the Mechanic in the sequel to the 2011 action-thiller. When the deceitful actions of a cunning but beautiful woman [Jessica Alba] force him to return to the life he left behind, Bishop's life is once again in danger as he has to complete an impossible list of assassinations of the most dangerous men in the world.

programme.title: Gladiator

programme.title: Panic
programme.desc: Alex is a killer for hire who wants out of the family business of murder, but the family has other ideas. Things boil over when he falls in love with a woman he meets at psychiatrist's office.

programme.title: Deadline
programme.desc: A screenwriter travels to an abandoned house to finish a script on time.

programme.title: Eye of the Beholder
programme.desc: A private eye shadows a female serial killer of men all over the U.S. without her knowing as he, strangely enough, occasionally acts as her guardian angel.

programme.title: Gladiator
programme.desc: A man robbed of his name and his dignity strives to win them back, and gain the freedom of his people, in this epic historical drama from director Ridley Scott.

programme.title: Vengeance: A Love Story
programme.desc: Single mother Teena is brutally assaulted by a gang. When the criminals are set free, Detective John Dromoor is dismayed as to the lack of justice and plots revenge.

programme.title: The Way Of The Gun
programme.desc: A pair of bumbling criminals kidnap a woman for ransom money, but they soon realize they've made a huge mistake when they learn she is a surrogate for a ruthless mob boss.

programme.title: Erased
programme.desc: Ex-CIA operative Ben Logan (Aaron Eckhart, The Dark Knight) has been long estranged from his young daughter (Liana Liberato).

programme.title: Kill Switch
programme.desc: A troubled detective travels to Memphis in order to track down a pair of serial killers.

programme.title: Lucky Seven
programme.desc: From summer camp to law school, and through five of the boyfriends she's supposed to date before she meets lucky seven, Amy has followed the timeline that her mother drew for her. But what is she supposed to do when she falls in love with number six?

programme.title: Love's Sweet Recipe
programme.desc: Courtney is a chef who runs her family's restaurant, armed with a family heirloom her father left behind called the "Rule Book of Love" to guide the way. Handsome Jake is there to help, and she finds love in a place she least expected.

programme.title: The Wedding Rule
programme.desc: Gemma and Max, former childhood friends are bequeathed a beloved restaurant on one condition: they must be married to claim the inheritance. The race is on to find the “one”, will they succeed?

programme.title: 2 Years of Love
programme.desc: Samantha has a great marriage, until the pressure to have a baby comes up. Things get tricky when she starts falling for one of her clients, not realizing it is secretly her husband. Will they be able to make it through this rough patch?

programme.title: Signed, Sealed, Delivered
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. A mix up on her first day of work sends Shane to the Dead Letter Office.

programme.title: Love in Paradise
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. A Western movie star is forced to spend a PR weekend at a dude ranch.

programme.title: Love at Sea
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. Olivia gets a great opportunity to organize an event on a luxury cruise.

programme.title: Wedding March 3: Here Comes the Bride
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. It's a full Valentine's Day weekend at the Inn.

programme.title: A Woman Hunted
programme.desc: A young mother, just out of drug rehabilitation.

programme.title: Obsessed
programme.desc: Medical writer Ellena Roberts is arrested for harassing Dr. David Stillman.

programme.title: And Baby Will Fall
programme.desc: Based on the best selling novel by Hallie Ephron.

programme.title: My Daughter Must Live
programme.desc: Meghan O'Malley learns her husband is not the girl's biological father.

programme.title: Winter's Bone
programme.desc: An Ozark Mountain girl hacks through dangerous social terrain as she hunts down her drug-dealing father.

programme.title: Mud
programme.desc: Two boys discover a desperado on the run. After hearing his incredible tale, they decide to help him.

programme.title: A Murder of Crows
programme.desc: A disbarred lawyer takes credit for a late friend's book, but the tables turn on him sooner than he suspected.

programme.title: Horsemen
programme.desc: A series of murders seem to be based on the biblical prophecies concerning the Four Horsemen of the Apocalypse

programme.title: Sky Captain and the World of Tomorrow
programme.desc: When mysterious giant robots begin attacking the streets of New York City, intrepid reporter Polly Perkins is on the story and enlists the aid of ace aviator and old flame Joseph 'Sky Captain' Sullivan.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: From director Michael Bay and executive producer Steven Spielberg comes a thrilling battle between the heroic Autobots and the evil Decepticons. When their epic struggle comes to Earth, Sam Witwicky becomes mankind's last chance for survival.

programme.title: Transformers: Dark of the Moon
programme.desc: A mysterious event from Earth's past threatens to ignite a war so big that the Transformers alone will not be able to save the planet. Sam Witwicky and the Autobots must fight against the darkness to defend our world from the Decepticons.

programme.title: Eagle Eye
programme.desc: Jerry and Rachel are two strangers thrown together by a phone call from a woman they have never met.

programme.title: Into The Wild
programme.desc: Christopher abandons his possessions, gives his $24,000 savings account to charity and hitchhikes to Alaska

programme.title: The Way of the Dragon
programme.desc: A man visits his relatives at their restaurant and has to help them defend against brutal gangsters.

programme.title: Air Force One
programme.desc: Harrison Ford and Gary Oldman star in Wolfgang Petersen's thriller about the hijacking of Air Force One with the First Family on board.

programme.title: The Lazarus Project
programme.desc: A harrowing and frightening thriller about a man who has everything he's ever loved stripped away from him and to earn his life and family back, he must face obstacles of mystical origins, endure countless tests of his faith, struggle with his own sanity, and explore the depth and the power of his soul.

programme.title: Runaway (1984)
programme.desc: A cop of the future, an evil genius and a murderous robotic force in a deadly chase of runaway terror.

programme.title: Solo
programme.desc: An android killing machine begins to develop a human conscience.

programme.title: The Wild One
programme.desc: Inspired by an incident in 1946 when a group of 4,000 motorcyclists celebrated the Fourth of July by invading a small California town.

programme.title: Affair In Trinidad
programme.desc: A mysterious death in Trinidad finds a beautiful nightclub singer and her suspicious brother-in-law caught up in a web of espionage as they try to bring the killer to justice.

programme.title: All The King's Men
programme.desc: A dynamic backwoods personality rides a wave of populist fervor straight into the governor's mansion, only to fall prey to the corruption and influence peddling that he pledged to fight.

programme.title: The Heroes Of Telemark
programme.desc: It is 1942 and Norway is under the thumb of the Nazis. In a Norwegian factory, Nazis are producing "heavy water," an essential element in the production of atomic weapons. The leader of the Norwegian underground is enlisted by British intelligence to aid in destroying the factory.

programme.title: Father Goose
programme.desc: Cary Grant stars in one of his funniest roles as a boozy beachcomber sitting out WWII in peace - until the Allies recruit him to be a lookout on the South Pacific isle.

programme.title: That Touch of Mink
programme.desc: Love arrives with a splash when a handsome and eligible tycoon and a beautiful working woman meet over a curbside mud puddle. He's enchanted by her small town ways, she's captivated by his romantic, debonair manner.

programme.title: Sunset Boulevard
programme.desc: Intense, enthralling, and unforgettable, Sunset Boulevard stars Gloria Swanson as Norma Desmond, a faded silent-movie star, and William Holden as Joe Gillis, a down-on-his-luck screenwriter whom she enlists to help her make her triumphant return.

channel.display-name: Movies on the Rotten Tomatoes Channel

programme.title: Charade
programme.desc: Charade is an thriller that manages to spoof its genre while at the same time being uncommonly suspenseful.

programme.title: Come September
programme.desc: A New York businessman visits his Italian villa to relax with his girlfriend, but his home has become a hotel.

programme.title: Babe
programme.desc: A shy little pig doesn't know his place. With the help of barnyard friends, Babe learns he can be anything!

programme.title: Shanghai Express
programme.desc: Train passengers traveling through China encounter trouble in the form of a Chinese rebel and his followers.

programme.title: Alex & the List
programme.desc: Jennifer Morrison and Patrick Fugit star in this charming romantic comedy. When Alex's gorgeous girlfriend gives him a list of changes he must make to win her hand, he must decide how to secure her love and fend off a suave competitor.

programme.title: Cassanova Was a Woman
programme.desc: Cassanova Canto is a 5'7, blonde, blue-eyed Cuban-American struggling actor who has fallen in love with a woman, while still married to her husband..

programme.title: Shoot To Marry
programme.desc: Heartbroken filmmaker Steve Markle has found the perfect way to meet women: ask them to be in his documentary! Steve stumbles through interviews with dozens of intriguing women intent on finding love.

programme.title: 16-Love
programme.desc: 16-yr old Alley 'Smash' Mash (Lindsey Shaw, 10 THINGS I HATE ABOUT YOU) dominates the tennis court. An injury and an unlikely encounter teach her how to win in love off the court.

programme.title: Stolen Daughter
programme.desc: A female police detective's teenage daughter is kidnapped by an emotionally disturbed parolee.

programme.title: Stressed To Death
programme.desc: At a robbery at a mini mart an EMT is faced with two victims a pregnant lady and a man shot but still alive.

programme.title: Text To Kill
programme.desc: Teens band together to investigate the source of anonymous messages that threaten to expose their secrets.

programme.title: Pursued
programme.desc: A fast rising hi tech executive must protect his career and family from the ruthless tactics of a homicidal corporate headhunter.

programme.title: Falling for the Manny
programme.desc: Alice is up for partner at her firm and hires her sister's manny, Jacob, to help with her daughter.

programme.title: Picking Up And Dropping Off
programme.desc: Will and Jane struggle to come to terms with the reality of being single parents while longing for companionship and love.

programme.title: Mrs. Lambert Remembers Love
programme.desc: Lil is an elderly widowed woman whose last joy in life is caring for her young grandson, Jared. When Social Services begins to doubt Lil's mental stability, Lil takes Jared on the road to avoid losing custody of him, inspiring a journey of self-discovery.

programme.title: Primal Doubt
programme.desc: A romance novelist (Janine Turner) is the prime suspect in the murder of a widower (Nick Kiriazis) she met on the Internet.

programme.title: The Psycho She Met Online
programme.desc: When her husband is hospitalized, a woman decides to rent out spare rooms in their house to help cover costs. All goes well until she begins to suspect that something is off with their newest guest.

programme.title: Stranger in Town, A
programme.desc: Aaron Tomlinson, along with his mother Katherine and little sister Kim move from the big city to Elm Creek. Katherine has just come out of a bad relationship, and decides they all need a change of scenery. The family moves into old Victorian house.

programme.title: Twenty Hacker
programme.desc: White hacker club 'Better World' and a genius hacker 'HEX' have an inevitable showdown with the black hackers as they hack the biggest cryptocurrency exchange in South Korea. To take revenge for his father and protect the love of his life against the black hackers, young and reckless Jae-min, a.k.a HEX, now must prove his hacking ability to the world.

programme.title: Deep Trap
programme.desc: As a couple's therapy for trauma, Jun-sik and So-yeon travel to a remote island and visit a shabby restaurant.

programme.title: My Wife
programme.desc: Si-hun manages a shabby house for rent. Next day, Mi-jung takes the room and they start to fall in love.

programme.title: Montage
programme.desc: A mother who lost her child to a kidnapper 15 years ago will not let the same crime happen again.

programme.title: Killer Zaddy
programme.desc: Naomi Anderson is a college student, struggling financially looking for a new job. She meets a successful, handsome, older gentleman that gives her everything she's been dreaming of. Naomi soon realizes her dreams may come at a price.

programme.title: The Benefit List
programme.desc: Alexis is at the top of her game as an insurance agent representing the biggest artists in the country until, her clients begin being mysteriously killed.

programme.title: The Substitute Spy
programme.desc: A group of kids obsessed with playing video games mistakenly uncover a plot by someone in their school to control the world. At their school, they start to notice weird things from students and faculty alike. While trying to uncover the cause of suspicious activity, they find out that their substitute science teacher is a secret agent sent to bring the bad guys to justice. The motley crew of kids believe their principal is the leader of this syndicate, but they soon discover that someone they never would have thought of is the mastermind intent on world domination.

programme.title: The Underwoods of Napa Valley
programme.desc: Unemployed chef, Briana Rutledge, inherits her grandmother's cottage in Napa, California. She sets out to turn the cottage into her dream restaurant, but Tiffany Young and her father, restaurateur Nathaniel Young, plot to run Briana out of town.

programme.title: Stolen
programme.desc: A former thief frantically searches for his missing daughter, who has been kidnapped and locked in the trunk of a taxi. Starring Nicolas Cage and Malin Akerman.

programme.title: Mercenary for Justice
programme.desc: In this crime thriller, mercenary John Seeger (Steven Seagal, "Exit Wounds") attempts to break into Eastern Europe's most impenetrable prison and free the son of a notorious drug lord.

programme.title: Life of a King
programme.desc: An ex-felon on a path of redemption defies convention and establishes a Chess Club for inner-city teenagers.

programme.title: Gang of Roses
programme.desc: A gang of gold-hunting outlaws, headed by the ruthless Left Eye Watkins (Bobby Brown), takes over the peaceful town of Flatridge, tearing the sleepy outpost to shreds as they search for riches. They murder a can-can girl, who is the sister of Rachel (Monica Calhoun), the onetime leader of a notorious all-girl gang. Rachel then rounds up her four old associates, and they seek revenge for her sister. Using teamwork and a sassy attitude, Rachel's gang goes up against Watkins' tough crew.

programme.title: Eye See You
programme.desc: Recovering from the psychological effects of witnessing a brutal crime, FBI Agent Jake Malloy (Sylvester Stallone) checks into a rehabilitation clinic for law enforcement officers in the remote wilderness of Wyoming during the dead of winter. He soon finds himself helping other patients as a serial killer begins killing them one by one.

programme.title: King of the Avenue
programme.desc: An ambitious drug dealer sells his soul to the devil to become the city's biggest drug boss, knowing that when Satan comes to collect, he'll have to outwit a most evil force.

programme.title: Thrill Seekers
programme.desc: When intrepid reporter Tom Merrick discovers that the same man appears in photographs of major disasters over a hundred-year period, he embarks on an incredible action-filled race against time to prevent a series of new disasters.

programme.title: Nowhere to Land
programme.desc: After deadly nerve gas is planted on a plane, a pilot must safely land a 747 between Hawaii and LA: the longest flying stretch without a place to land in emergencies. Starring Jack Wagner.

programme.title: Paul Simon
programme.desc: During the first leg of Paul Simon's triumphant, 2011 U.S. tour, he thrilled hometown fans with a special club performance at New York City's historic Webster Hall. The show presents this iconic artist working at the peak of his artistic and creative powers in an unusually intimate setting. The 20-song, 90-minute set list was drawn from his legendary career and includes several songs that haven't been performed live in many years. "Kodachrome," "Mother and Child Reunion," "Gone At Last" and "The Obvious Child" are just some of the highlights as well as songs from Simon's most recent album, 2011's So Beautiful or So What (Hear Music/Concord Music Group) including "Dazzling Blue," "Rewrite," "The Afterlife" and the album's propulsive title track.

programme.title: Various Artists
programme.desc: The best of Qello Concerts

programme.title: Van Halen
programme.desc: VAN HALEN achieved worldwide fame for their many popular songs and larger-than-life stage performances they also became known for the drama surrounding the departures of former members. Controversy surrounded the band following the exits of Roth, Hagar, and Anthony this controversy often included numerous conflicting press statements between the former members and the band. In 2007, Van Halen was inducted into the Rock and Roll Hall of Fame. VH1 ranked them 7th on their list of the top 100 hard rock artists of all time. Using interviews, news archive and performance this episode reveals the unique aspect of this iconic band.

programme.title: Various Artists

programme.title: Foo Fighters
programme.desc: The Austin City Limits Music Festival is an annual music festival that takes place at Zilker Park in Austin, Texas. The festival features more than 130 bands on eight stages for three days.

programme.title: Foo Fighters
programme.desc: With a career of over two decades and album sales over 11 million, Foo Fighters are giants in the world of contemporary rock. The roots of the band were of a much smaller scale, though, with the early musical projects of a teenage Dave Grohl. Nirvana came to a tragic end with the death of front man, Kurt Cobain. Grohl began working with the songs he had written on tour, to produce the first Foo Fighters album. With 2 Grammys, multiple albums including a best of and a new album release in 2014 there is no stopping them. Featuring archive material, music videos – “BEST OF YOU” “MONKEY WRENCH” and, exclusive insights from music critics and journalists JOHN AIZLEWOOD (Evening Standard), DANIELLE PERRY (XFM), WILL HODGKINSON (The Times) & CAMILLA PIA (BBC Radio 6)

programme.title: Beck
programme.desc: Discreet genie, it's a Music-Man (with capital Ms) that's coming to Eurockennes. Since Loser in 1993, Beck trims his mix of styles. Sometimes groove, sometimes soft, sometimes rock, psyched or hip-hop. Beck, multi-instrumentalist and talented producer has offered to the last twenty years, it must be admitted, serious masterpieces.

programme.title: La Novia de mi Mejor Amigo
programme.desc: Tank se enfrenta a la mayor prueba de amistad posible cuando su mejor amigo lo contrata para que llevé a su ex novia a una pésima cita.

programme.title: Destilando amor: Amante
programme.desc: Sofía se pone muy celosa al ver a Francisco borracho y cree que la engaña, pero él trata de convencerla de que no es así. Sanjuana va a buscar a Hilario, pero él la corre y le exige que se aleje de él.

programme.title: Teresa: Vieja amistad
programme.desc: Luisa se encuentra con Lucía, una vieja amiga de la escuela. Arturo le pide a Jacinto vigile a Teresa para saber si sigue o no engañándolo. Rubén está dispuesto a todo para quitarle su hijo a Esperanza.

programme.title: Rubí: Huyendo del amor
programme.desc: Una vez en la oficina, Rubí no pierde momento para coquetearle a Héctor. Alejandro sospecha que Rubí se trae algo entre manos. Héctor empieza a caer en los juegos de seducción de Rubí y descuida ciertas atenciones con Maribel.

programme.title: Fuego en la sangre: Sin rastro
programme.desc: Juan organiza una búsqueda por todo el pueblo para encontrar a su hija, pero la policía llega para detenerlo. Sofía sufre al no tener noticia del paradero de su hija. Rosario escucha a Fernando hablar sobre lo que le hizo a Juan.

programme.title: Al diablo con los guapos: Conflictos en casa
programme.desc: Florencia acusa a Mili de querer ser la amante de Alejandro. Damián aclara que no es pareja de Braulio. Braulio se ve forzado a intervenir en el conflicto entre Constancio y Néstor y les pide poner orden entre Luciana y Andrea.

programme.title: Vino el amor: Su lugar de mujer
programme.desc: Graciela se encuentra con Juan. Por otro lado, Luciana le pide a Miguel que la ayude a olvidarse de David.

programme.title: Amor real
programme.desc: Remigio le dice a Adolfo que lo va a acompañar por si le falla la puntería. Manuel recibe la carta de Adolfo citándolo y Silvano le dice que no vaya, que tal vez lo quiera matar. Pero Manuel le responde que no hay motivos para temer.

programme.title: Corazón indomable: Entre locura y alegría
programme.desc: El padre le dice a Maricruz que Simona ha perdido la razón y José Antonio por fin le regresa a su hija.

programme.title: Marimar Capítulo 53
programme.desc: Gema le dice a Esteban que solo estará con Arturo si él se comporta como un caballero. Sergio le dice a Bella que sabe que está celosa de Natalia porque lo quiere.

programme.title: Marimar Capítulo 54
programme.desc: Angélica encuentra a Renato con otra mujer y borracho. El bebé de Angélica sufre un terrible accidente.

programme.title: María la del Barrio Capítulo 73
programme.desc: Alicia sufre al saber que debe regresar a casa de Soraya. María idea un plan para evitar que Soraya maltrate a Alicia. Nandito enfrenta a Soraya para pedirle que se aleje de su familia.

programme.title: María la del Barrio Capítulo 74
programme.desc: Soraya planea todo para que culpen a Nandito de la muerte de la Nana Calixta. María se molesta con Luis Fernando porque continúa bebiendo.

programme.title: María Mercedes Capítulo 1
programme.desc: María Mercedes es una pobre joven que se encarga de mantener a su familia. Jorge Luis se casa con Diana pero a la salida de la iglesia el ex novio le dispara.

programme.title: María Mercedes Capítulo 2
programme.desc: Santiago buscará la forma de hacer que Malvina no se quede con todo su dinero después de morir. Meche conoce a Jorge Luis de quién se enamora tras haberle pedido dinero.

programme.title: Marimar Capítulo 53
programme.desc: Gema le dice a Esteban que solo estará con Arturo si él se comporta como un caballero. Sergio le dice a Bella que sabe que está celosa de Natalia porque lo quiere.

programme.title: Marimar Capítulo 54
programme.desc: Angélica encuentra a Renato con otra mujer y borracho. El bebé de Angélica sufre un terrible accidente.

programme.title: Cuidado con el Ángel
programme.desc: El Dr. Durán invita a Juan Miguel a trabajar con él. Cande encuentra el joyero de Marichuy en la basura. Patricio le exige a Marichuy que se olvide de Juan Miguel. Ana Julia se lleva a Mayita sin avisar, dejando a todos muy angustiados.

programme.title: Cuidado con el Ángel
programme.desc: Ana Julia llega con Mayita y miente al decir que le había avisado a Cande. Las cirugías de Juan Miguel fracasan, pero el doctor Durán le pide que no se rinda. Ana Julia le miente a Juan Miguel y a Marichuy inventando romances para separarlos.

programme.title: Triunfo del amor
programme.desc: María va a buscar a Victoria para pedirle trabajo pero ella la trata muy mal María descubre que Max le mintió y que su nombre no es Fabián.

programme.title: Triunfo del amor
programme.desc: Max sigue a María y le pide perdón por haberle mentido. Milagros ayudará a Nati a encontrar a su alma gemela. Antonieta le pide a María que se aleje de Max pues va a sufrir mucho. Max le dice a María que quiere estar con ella y la besa.

programme.title: Triunfo del amor
programme.desc: María le cuenta a Nati y Linda que Max solo quería tener intimidad con ella, pero que no la ama. Victoria le pregunta a Osvaldo si ha pensado en estar con otra mujer, él se molesta y le dice que no. Victoria se encela de Linda Sortini.

programme.title: Triunfo del amor
programme.desc: Bernarda le prohíbe a Tomasa decirle la verdad sobre Victoria a Juan Pablo. Osvaldo le pide a Victoria que piense un poco en lo que él quiere frente a la prensa. Max le pide perdón a María, la lleva a cenar y ella decide darle una oportunidad.

programme.title: Cuidado con el Ángel
programme.desc: Marichuy se cae por las escaleras y queda inconsciente. Ana Julia culpa a Candelaria del accidente, pero Candelaria también la acusa. Patricio se siente mal por la discusión y cae inconsciente.

programme.title: Sortilegio: Comprometedora confesión
programme.desc: Pedro le pide un favor a María José para que Alex contrate a Meche. Victoria se enoja cuando descubre que Bruno le salvó la vida a María José a cambio de la presidencia.

programme.title: Abismo de pasión: Ingrid es enterrada viva
programme.desc: Gabino se escapa del hospital para vengarse de Ingrid. Florencia continúa engañando a todos con su supuesto embarazo.

programme.title: Soy tu dueña: Amor imposible
programme.desc: Sandra y Felipe preparan todo para festejar su boda. Toledo le confiesa a Valentina el inmenso amor que siente por ella. Isabel es acosada por las presas de la cárcel, quienes le exigen una fuerte cantidad de dinero a cambio de seguridad.

programme.title: La usurpadora: Cambio de imagen
programme.desc: Estefanía le confiesa a Piedad que Paola y Willy son amantes. Carlos Daniel contrata a nueva asistente. Toda la familia queda sorprendida con el cambio de imagen de Estefanía.

programme.title: El manantial: Amenazas de Justo
programme.desc: Bárbara tiene una conversación con Margarita y le hace una promesa. Justo amenaza a Alfonsina. ¿Qué le pasa a Salvador?

programme.title: Imperio de mentiras: Traición familiar
programme.desc: José Luis traiciona a su familia tras saber que Leonardo será su jefe y lo echa de la casa. Darío le da una sorpresa a Victoria. Renata despierta y puede ver a Elisa.

programme.title: La Gata: Un fuerte amor
programme.desc: Pablo invita a Esmeralda a su casa para que pueda comer algo. Lorenza la humilla y la echa, pero Virginia y Pablo intentan defenderla. Por otro lado, Pablo le dice a Esmeralda que se casará con ella.

programme.title: Una familia de diez: La enfermera
programme.desc: Por unos estornudos de Placido, la Nena será la enfermera encargada de cuidarlo. Mientras, Gaby se convierte en maquilladora y peinadora.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche
programme.desc: Federica vende zapatos de piel por catálogo y Ludovico se pone muy celoso porque está ganando mucho dinero y decide competir con ella vendiendo ropa interior para mujer, pero es detenido por vender sin permiso.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche
programme.desc: Ludovico y Federica están aprendiendo a usar el chat para conocer gente usando nombres falsos. En el chat, sin darse cuenta. se encuentran entre ellos.

programme.title: 40 y 20
programme.desc: Paco se va de viaje y Fran encuentra la oportunidad perfecta para ganarse unos dólares alquilando el departamento de su papá a unos viejitos por el fin de semana unas horas más tarde el vuelo de Paco se cancela.

programme.title: 40 y 20
programme.desc: Fran acaba de conocer a Karime y se enamora perdidamente de ella. Sólo hay un pequeño problema: Karime se casa el próximo fin de semana.

programme.title: Vecinos
programme.desc: Los vecinos se quedan sin gas por no pagar su cuota. Luis es el único que paga su parte, e instala su propio tanque, al que Magda le cierra la llave cuando se baña. Lorena extraña a Benito.

programme.title: Vecinos
programme.desc: Luis estaciona su carro afuera de su edificio y un franelero quiere cobrarle 20 pesos por cuidar su coche. Luis, Arturo y Germán se enfrentan a los cuidadores de carros, pero no logran que se vayan. Los vecinos hacen una junta.

programme.title: XHDRBZ
programme.desc: El Lonje Moco se queda dormido presentando sus historias. Julian Tesquenadie presenta el quemador de discos con patos. La licenciada Pamela Juanjo entrevista a Luis Miguel.

programme.title: XHDRBZ
programme.desc: Alz y Heimmer hablan sobre sus amigos del pasado, pero uno de ellos olvida todo. El agente "D Zente" abre un nuevo caso titulado "El asesinato del millonario de la calle Hill".

programme.title: Hotel todo Incluido
programme.desc: Don Cipriano le cuenta a los empleados que Ninel Conde celebrará su baby shower en el hotel, pero el licenciado Mariano Brajales le informa que hay una denuncia en contra del hotel porque no tiene las medidas de seguridad necesarias.

programme.title: Hotel todo Incluido
programme.desc: Vitor y sus compañeros confunden a dos huéspedes con una banda de asaltantes llamada la "La Banda del Disfraz", pero resultan ser unos actores de teatro que están ensayando para interpretar a una banda de ladrones.

programme.title: Nosotros los guapos
programme.desc: Vítor y Albertano se emocionan porque participarán en el juego final de su equipo del barrio y les piden ayuda a Natacha y Cuca para entrenar, pues son muy malos jugadores.

programme.title: Nosotros los guapos
programme.desc: Nacho le regala un vestido a Cuca pero cuando confiesa que era de otra mujer ella se molesta. Albertano decide jugar en otro equipo de fútbol por culpa de Vítor.

programme.title: María de Todos los Ángeles: Los chiles de la discordia
programme.desc: Carmelo queda encerrado probando la alarma del negocio. María sueña que debe ganarse el corazón de Doña Lucha para conquistar a Albertano, y para eso prepara unos deliciosos chiles, aunque esto despierta un sentimiento de competencia.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Diego descubre que Pilar arregló la rifa de Roberta. Alma es la nueva modelo de la marca de Franco. Leonardo vuelve a intentar acercarse a Lupita antes de irse del colegio. Mía descubre que hay alguien inculpando a Miguel.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Mía sufre porque Miguel se declaró culpable y no quiere verla. Lola y Bianca se reconcilian. Roberta y Jose hacen un plan para sabotear la campaña de Diego. Lupita se comunica con la mamá de Nico al no recibir ningún mensaje de él.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Roberta intenta sobornar a Sol para conseguir una copia del discurso de Diego. Yuli le hace creer a Lupita que Karen y Nico están en Israel. Mía intenta escaparse para ver a Miguel y Gandía la expulsa.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Mía le inventa a Gandía que Gastón le pidió hacer unos trámites y por eso iba a salir, para que no la expulse. Finalmente, Mía logra visitar a Miguel en la cárcel, pero él se niega a verla.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Mía va a visitar a Miguel a la cárcel para pagar su fianza, pero él le dice que no quiere verla y la echa.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Vico acusa a Luján y Roberta de ser unas estafadoras y ladronas, por lo que ambas se molestan demasiado y se agarran a golpes.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Pilar le dice a Gandía que engañó a sus compañeros igual que él a su mamá Miguel decide terminar su noviazgo con Mia Lola le pide a Santos fingir que son novios Yuli quiere que Alicia le entregue todas las cartas que envíe Nico para Lupita.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Galia le exige a Gandía que Pilar reciba un castigo. Teo discute con José por el Club Hípico. Raquel le dice a Roberta que si logra que corran a Pilar, ganará votos. Pilar les confiesa a todos que cometió un fraude y delata a Diego.

programme.title: Corazón salvaje
programme.desc: Renato hará hasta lo imposible para lograr separar a Regina de Juan. Juan habla frente al juez para pedirle que haga justicia y lo deje en libertad. El juez declara inocente a Juan de los delitos que se le acusan.

programme.title: Corazón salvaje
programme.desc: Aimeé siente celos al saber que Renato está interesado en Regina. Clemencia le confiesa a Regina que Leonarda es la responsable de la desaparición de María del Rosario. Juan logra encontrar a María del Rosario.

programme.title: Fuego en la sangre
